old: In cancer, VEGF promotes migration of tumour-infiltrating FOXP3+ regulatory T cells.
new: In cancer, VEGF could promote migration of tumour-infiltrating FOXP3+ Treg cells.

old: In cancer, VEGF enhances the immunosuppressive function of tumour-infiltrating FOXP3+ regulatory T cells.
new: In cancer, VEGF could promote the immunosuppressive function of tumour-infiltrating FOXP3+ Treg cells.

old: The pro-inflammatory FOXP3(lo) non-Treg cells are predicted to confer better survival in colorectal cancer patients.
new: Colorectal cancer patients with abundant FOXP3(lo) Treg cell infiltration are predicted to have better survival.
